prs.title: Centralized admin tools page
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 46 files and 5105 custom lines building out a full centralized admin tools page with multiple dialog components, navigation, layout, and data tables across companies, products, rivals, and audit events — a major feature touching broad surface area.

prs.title: feat: full prospect inbound pipeline with ACE enrichment and settings UI
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 22137 custom lines across 306 files implementing a full prospect inbound pipeline with ACE enrichment, settings UI, schema changes, seed data, and a prospect enrichment agent — a transformative, multi-week architectural effort.

prs.title: Regenerate docs and tests for post-refactor codebase
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 6592 lines across 100 files but the bulk is regenerated docs and tests rather than novel logic, making the actual engineering effort modest — primarily a maintenance/documentation refresh task.

prs.title: Remove legacy gaps code, rename Goals to Milestones
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 123 files touched with 656 custom lines removing legacy gaps code and performing a Goals→Milestones rename across AI agents, prompts, assessments, and UI — a significant cross-cutting refactor requiring careful coordination.

prs.title: SM-488: can select more AWS services
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Only 2 custom lines changed across 3 files to expand the selectable AWS services list — a trivial data/config tweak.

prs.title: outcome page
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 132 lines across 2 files adding or updating an outcome/performance page and task detail client — a small, self-contained UI addition.

prs.title: SM-470: updates aws product catalog
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 316 lines in a single migration SQL file adding the full AWS services catalog — straightforward data migration with no application logic changes.

prs.title: SM-512: improves user session handling to prevent 403 errors
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 84 lines across 3 files improving user session handling in DAL, session lib, and header to prevent 403 errors — a modest but meaningful security/reliability fix touching auth infrastructure.

prs.title: SM-515: competitive analysis improvements
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 54 lines across 3 files making targeted improvements to the competitive analysis studio agent graph, tools, and toolbar plugin — a small focused enhancement.

prs.title: SM-511: Outcomes page caching issue
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 18 lines across 2 files fixing a caching issue on the outcomes page in DAL and session — a minimal targeted bug fix.

prs.title: SM-492: updates assessment page, removes outcomes
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 71 lines across 17 files updating the assessment page and removing outcomes — low line count but the breadth of files touched across components, hooks, utils, and sandbox pages indicates a modest coordinated refactor.

prs.title: SM-505: Adds ISV to target industry dropdown list
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 9 lines across 3 files adding ISV to a target industry dropdown — a trivial data/config addition with a small migration.

prs.title: Add loginDisabled hard-lock for users
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 936 lines across 36 files implementing a loginDisabled hard-lock feature spanning schema, migrations, auth actions, admin UI controls, and multiple API routes — a significant security feature with broad system integration.

prs.title: fix(readiness): Marketplace Discovery seller matching + legacy tooling
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 71 lines across 2 files fixing marketplace discovery seller matching logic plus a TODO doc — a small targeted bug fix with minor supporting documentation.

prs.title: Exit chip for stuck portfolio-company drill-down
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 186 lines across 5 files adding an exit chip for stuck portfolio-company drill-down state, touching portfolio context actions, admin nav, layout, header, and user menu — a modest UI/UX improvement with light backend context handling.

stories.name: Prospect Inbound Pipeline with Enrichment
stories.rationale: Delivered a full prospect inbound pipeline with ACE enrichment and a settings UI to automate and streamline how new prospects enter the platform.

stories.name: Centralized Admin Tooling & Documentation
stories.rationale: Built a centralized admin tools page and refreshed auto-generated docs and tests to support post-refactor maintainability.

stories.name: Milestones Rebrand & Legacy Cleanup
stories.rationale: Removed legacy gaps code and renamed the 'Goals' concept to 'Milestones' to align the platform with updated product terminology.

stories.name: User Access Control & Session Reliability
stories.rationale: Hardened user access by adding a loginDisabled hard-lock, fixing session handling to prevent 403 errors, and resolving an Outcomes page caching issue.

stories.name: AWS Service & Product Catalog Expansion
stories.rationale: Expanded the AWS product catalog data and enabled users to select a broader range of AWS services in the UI.

stories.name: Outcomes Page Improvements
stories.rationale: Refreshed the Outcomes page and updated the assessment page by removing the redundant outcomes section to streamline the user journey.

stories.name: Competitive Analysis & Marketplace Discovery Enhancements
stories.rationale: Improved competitive analysis output quality and fixed seller matching in Marketplace Discovery while cleaning up legacy tooling.

stories.name: Target Industry Data Expansion
stories.rationale: Added ISV as an option to the target industry dropdown to better reflect the range of customers using the platform.

stories.name: Portfolio Company Drill-Down Navigation Fix
stories.rationale: Added an exit chip so users can escape a stuck portfolio-company drill-down view, restoring smooth navigation in the portfolio section.
